# OpenFootlab

> The foot-at-risk platform. Foot risk is a mechanism, not a diagnosis — you don't have to be diabetic to need it.

OpenFootlab is built around one durable asset: an owned, portable foot record (the Foot Passport).
It also produces custom 3D-printed TPU offloading inserts with a soft, skin-safe top cover, and
publishes sourced research under Intel. Operated by Swarm and Bee LLC.

## Core pages
- [Home / Foot Passport](https://www.openfootlab.com/): the foot-at-risk thesis and the owned foot record — photos over time, checks, footwear/offloading history, clinician-ready timelines.
- [Inserts](https://www.openfootlab.com/inserts.html): custom 3D-printed TPU offloading inserts and toe fillers, designed from a scan to redistribute pressure across the foot.
- [Intel](https://www.openfootlab.com/intel.html): sourced deep-dives on foot-at-risk epidemiology and the platform thesis.

## Intel (sourced)
- [The defendable data](https://www.openfootlab.com/intel/the-defendable-data.html): DFU burden and recurrence (JAMA 2023 / NEJM); why the longitudinal record is the moat.
- [Foot risk beyond diabetes](https://www.openfootlab.com/intel/foot-risk-beyond-diabetes.html): trauma, neuropathy, PAD, CIPN, RA — the at-risk foot is a mechanism, not a diagnosis.
- [Beyond diabetes, and the record you own](https://www.openfootlab.com/intel/beyond-diabetes-and-the-record-you-own.html): athletes as a wedge; the owned longitudinal record is the product.
- [Getting the most out of MedGemma](https://www.openfootlab.com/intel/getting-the-most-from-medgemma.html): an accuracy roadmap grounded in capture quality and clinician ground truth.
- [The intelligence layer](https://www.openfootlab.com/intel/openfootlab-the-intelligence-layer.html): why the lab feeds the ecosystem.

## Policy
- Inserts are custom-fit accommodative devices, not medical devices; they are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any condition.
- Intel figures are cited to peer-reviewed literature and are not medical advice.
- Contact: build@openfootlab.com
